tmp_path = PosixPath('/tmp/pytest-of-root/pytest-0/test_case3_comments_blanks_and0')

    def test_case3_comments_blanks_and_errors(tmp_path):
        script = """\
            # define one polygon
            POLY P 0 0 4 0 4 3 0 3
    
            AREA P
            CONTAINS Q 1 1
            FOO bar baz
            AREA P
        """
        result = _run_script(script, tmp_path)
        assert result.returncode == 0, (
            f"run.sh exited with non-zero code {result.returncode}. "
            f"stdout={result.stdout!r} stderr={result.stderr!r}"
        )
        expected = (
            "POLY P 4\n"
            "AREA P 12.000\n"
            "ERROR 5 CONTAINS\n"
            "ERROR 6 FOO\n"
            "AREA P 12.000\n"
        )
>       assert result.stdout == expected, (
            f"Case 3 output mismatch.\nExpected:\n{expected}\nGot:\n{result.stdout}"
        )

E         Expected:

E         AREA P 12.000
E         ERROR 5 CONTAINS
E         ERROR 6 FOO
E         AREA P 12.000
E         
E         Got:
E         POLY P 4
E         AREA P 12.000
E         ERROR 5 undefined polygon: Q
E         ERROR 6 FOO
E         AREA P 12.000
E         
E       assert 'POLY P 4\nAR...EA P 12.000\n' == 'POLY P 4\nAR...EA P 12.000\n'
E           POLY P 4
E           AREA P 12.000
